title: Connecting Online: The Good and The Bad

questions.sentence: Social media platforms have become a big part of our daily lives.
Millions of people around the world use them every day.
You can easily talk to friends and family who live far away.
Many people follow news pages or educational accounts, which can be very informative.
One common problem is spending too much time on these apps.
To use social media wisely, it's important to find a balance.
